name: Croation Poppy Seed Povitica
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup lukewarm water, for dissolving yeast
1 cup scalded milk, cooled to lukewarm
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: This recipe does not provide instructions for mixing dough. Mix as you would any cake that uses yeast and then follow the instructions below.
Dough: Knead into a smooth elastic dough, let rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour. Roll dough very thin, about 3 feet long and 1 1/2 feet wide on a floured plastic sheet.
Spread poppy seed filling on rolled dough and roll up like a jelly roll. Place in greased long narrow loaf pans. Let rise for 30 minutes. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes.
-Poppies Seed Filling:
Boil the filling ingredients for 10 minutes or until thick enough to spread. Cool and spread on thin rolled dough.
